arts.ttl: Forgotten fact in Hull City's season must sound alarm bell with 15 games to go
arts.sum: After winning at QPR on October 1, the only time this season they've won three in a row, the Tigers were thrashed 4-0 at Norwich City and have been sliding down the league ever since. C ity now have just 15 games to rescue what has become nothing short of a disastrous season and avoid what would be a potentially crippling relegation to League One, and it's a very real possibility.

arts.ttl: Hull City boss talks Louie Barry, Gustavo Puerta and home form ahead of Norwich City
arts.sum: City know that if they're to escape the relegation zone and survive in the Championship, turning around their desperate home form has to start quickly, with time running out and only six more at the MKM Stadium to come after this weekend's visit of the play-off-chasing Canaries. Some of the players, like (Anis Ben) Slimane, were playing for Bromby, so I know the team, and I think they are very competitive.

arts.ttl: Predicted Hull City line up for Norwich City with Gustavo Puerta and Louie Barry set for recalls
arts.sum: Aston Villa loanee Louie Barry came off the bench at Turf Moor in the second half, and, like he did on his debut against Stoke City, struggled to make an impact. John Egan was handed a debut against his former club, while there returns to the starting XI for Matt Crooks, Lewie Coyle and striker Joao Pedro in Lancashire.

arts.ttl: CRAZY Leeds United & Hull City Kit Deals
arts.sum: Leeds United and Hull City have dropped a massive price cut on their 2024-25 kits.

arts.ttl: Burnley chief Scott Parker makes surprising claim about Hull City's left-back situation
arts.sum: Irishman McLoughlin was deployed on the left side by Selles in away wins at Blackburn Rovers, Millwall and Sheffield United before coming up against an in-form Jaidon Anthony on Wednesday night, who tore City to pieces throughout in a game they were comprehensively outplayed . On Anthony's mesmerising performance, Parker was full of praise for the job the on-loan Bournemouth winger did against a City side who just couldn't cope with the 25-year-old's electrifying display,

arts.ttl: ‘Number one target’ – Norwich City loan man hailed by club chief

arts.ttl: Norwich City boss delivers Hull City verdict diehards will agree is one of biggest frustrations
arts.sum: I know they changed a little bit in the game yesterday (Wednesday) evening against Burnley from first half to second half, but it's been consistent in how they want to build the game, press and stuff like that. "We know that Hull (City) also try to build the game and have their rotations inside the middle to create some space for their wingers on the outside, so our pressing game needs to be good as well.

arts.ttl: Hull City head coach delivers verdict on survival chances with 'character' assessment
arts.sum: "We need to start winning football matches if we want to be out of that and we have been a bit of in and out and show character to move forward. Ruben Selles believes he has the characters in his dressing room to drag Hull City away from relegation trouble at the wrong end of the Championship.
Tom Hill previews all 12 games in the Championship this weekend and has a score prediction for each clash.
